name: bim-spatial-tree
description: Hierarchical spatial tree for IFC spatial structure (IfcSite → IfcBuilding → IfcBuildingStorey → IfcSpace). role="tree" ARIA pattern. Default: storeys expanded, spaces collapsed. Workplace adds drag-to-reorder and context menu; console is selection-only.
html:
• Ground Floor
    • Private Office 01 — SL_25_10_60

variants.name: workplace
variants.description: Drag-to-reorder enabled; context menu (Rename / Create Space / Delete) on right-click.

variants.name: console
variants.description: Selection only — click expands/activates; no drag, no context menu.

aria: role="tree" on <ul>. role="treeitem" + aria-expanded on each <li>. aria-selected on active item. Keyboard: Up/Down navigate; Right expands; Left collapses; Enter activates.
